title: ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS)
short_info: Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) Lady Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 23-05-2026 on the official website of ANIIMS. Has been announced through the ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have MBBS qualification (as per NMC Norms) are eligible to apply for these Lady Medical Officer vacancies. The walk-in interview for ANIIMS Lady Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 30-05-2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and attend the walk-in interview through the direct links provided

salary_details.details: Consolidated monthly pay of Rs.86,000/- per month

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the ANIIMS recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) recruitment is Lady Medical Officer.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for the Lady Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The required qualification for the Lady Medical Officer position is MBBS as per NMC Norms.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Lady Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Lady Medical Officer post will receive a consolidated monthly pay of Rs. 86,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q5. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 30th May 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in venue.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The venue for the Walk-in Interview is Sri Vijaya Puram, Andaman and Nicobar Islands. Please refer to the official notification for the exact address.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of ANIIMS?
faq.answer: The official website of Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) is https://aniims.andamannicobar.gov.in.
